name: pyriksdagen
documentation:
# pyriksdagen

Python module for interacting with the Swedish Parliamentary Corpus

The use of the module is demonstrated in the [Example Jupyter Notebook](https://github.com/swerik-project/pyriksdagen/blob/main/examples/corpus-walkthrough.ipynb), which can also be run on [Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/swerik-project/pyriksdagen/blob/main/examples/corpus-walkthrough.ipynb).

modules.name: pyriksdagen.args
documentation: Dry Argparse helper.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.populate_common_arguments
documentation:
add arguments common to all doctypes to a parser object
    - start
    - end
    - year
    - from-list
    - specific-files
    - data-folder
Args:
    parser: argparse Parser

Returns:
    parser: argparse Parser

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.rename_file_list
documentation:
Renames the specific_files arg to a doctype-relevant name

Args:
    args: argparse Namespace
    doctype (str): document type

Returns:
    args

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.common_args
documentation:
common preprocessing of arguments

Args:
    args: argparse Argument namespace

Returns:
    args

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.record_parser
documentation:
Take an argparse ArgumentParser object and populate standard arguments for working with riksdagen records.

Args:
    parser: parser

Returns:
    parser

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.record_args
documentation:
Takes an argparse namespace object for working with riksdagen records and imputes standard stuff

Args:
    args: args

Returns:
    args

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.motion_parser
documentation:
Take an argparse ArgumentParser object and populate standard arguments for working with riksdagen motions.

Args:
    parser: parser

Returns:
    parser

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.motion_args
documentation:
Takes an argparse namespace object for working with riksdagen records and imputes standard stuff

Args:
    args: args
Returns:
    args

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.interpellation_parser
documentation:
Take an argparse ArgumentParser object and populate standard arguments for working with riksdagen interpellations.

Args:
    parser: parser

Returns:
    parser

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.interpellation_args
documentation:
Takes an argparse namespace object for working with riksdagen interpellations and imputes standard stuff

Args:
    args: args

Returns:
    args

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.fetch_parser
documentation:
Fetch an argparse argument parser based on the doctype.

Args:
    doctype (str): doctype, one listed in D
    docstring (str): string describing scripts for which the parser is called.

Returns:
    argparse Parser object

functions.name: pyriksdagen.args.impute_args
documentation:
Impute args based on the doctype (args.doctype).

Args:
    args: argparse parsed args namespace

Returns:
    argparse parsed args namespace

functions.name: pyriksdagen.match_mp.subnames_in_mpname
documentation: ## Depreceated functions below
NEW functions to replace both in_name, subnames_in_mpname, and mpsubnames_in_name

functions.name: pyriksdagen.match_mp.match_mp
documentation:
Pseudocode:
- inputs:
        - person with cleaned name and party_abbrev
        - db with cleaned name and filtered by chamber for efficiency
        - variables list of lists with variable combinations to match by
        - matching_funs list of functions to match/filter names by
- check if it is a talman/minister and use other matching function if true
- filter db by gender if persons gender is available
- use matching_funs in combination with variables until a unique match is found
- if there at any step is a match, return the persons db id

modules.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog
documentation: Functions relating to the Swerik Catalog.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog._json_template
documentation:
Returns mostly empty dict with person info.

Args:
    i (str): person ID
    v (str): version
    now (str): string-formatted timestamp

Returns:
    dict: person dict

functions.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog._party_template
documentation:
Returns instance of party affiliation.

Args:
    row (pd.core.series.Series): a row

Returns:
    dict: info about party affiliation

functions.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog._position_template
documentation:
Returns instance of a position held

Args:
    row (pd.core.series.Series): a row

Returns:
    dict: info about position

functions.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog._identifier_template
documentation:
Returns instance of an external identifier

Args:
    auth_code: authority abbreviation
    identifier (str): an external identifier

Returns:
    dict: info about external identifiers.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog._verify_J
documentation:
Verifies that Dict object is not totally empty before writing to a file.

Args:
    J (dict): dictionary object

Returns:
    bool: J is not empty

functions.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog._add_party
documentation:
Checks whether a party affiliation can be added to a person dict

Args:
    r (pd.core.series.Series): row
    J (dict): Person dict

Returns:
    bool: can add

functions.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog.jsonize_person_data
documentation:
Return a json object of all a n individual's info.

Args:
    person_id (str): person ID
    Corpus_metadata (pd.core.frame.DataFrame): corpus metadata (pyriksdagen.metadata.Corpus)
    peripheral_metadata (dict): metadata dict from non-core queries
    v (str): data version
    now (str): string formatted timestamp

Returns:
    dict: Person dict object

functions.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog.write_J
documentation:
Write a json file for each swerik ID with person's info.

Args:
    J (dict): person dict
    person_id (str): person id
    website_path (str): path in website repo

functions.name: pyriksdagen.swerik_catalog.write_md
documentation:
Write markwown file for each swerik ID

Args:
    person_id (str): person id
    website_path (str): path in website repo

modules.name: pyriksdagen.motions.curate
documentation: General utilities related to curation of Riksdagen motions.

modules.name: pyriksdagen.utils
documentation: Provides useful utilities for the other modules as well as for general use.
!/usr/bin/env python
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.elem_iter
documentation:
Return an iterator of the elements (utterances, notes, pbs) in a protocol body

Args:
    root (lxml.etree.Element): the protocol data as an lxml tree root
    ns (str): TEI namespace, defaults to TEI v1.0.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.infer_metadata
documentation:
Heuristically infer metadata from a protocol id or filename.

Args:
    filename (str): the protocols filename. Agnostic wrt. dashes and underscores. Can be relative or absolute.

Returns a dict with keys "protocol", "chamber", "year", and "number"

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.clean_html
documentation:
Read a HTML file and turn it into valid XML

Args:
    s (str): original HTML as a string

Returns:
    tree (lxml.etree.tree): XML tree

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.validate_xml_schema
documentation:
Validate an XML file against a schema.

Args:
    xml_path (str): path to the XML file
    schema_path (str): path to the schema file

Returns:
    is_valid (bool): whether the XML is valid according to the schema

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.corpus_iterator
documentation:
Returns an iterator of document paths in a corpus.

Args:
    document_type (str): type of document (prot, mot, etc.). Valid types:
                        - records | prot
                        - motions | mot
                        - interpellations | ipq
    corpus_root (str): path to the corpus root. If None, the function looks for the default location (see get_data_location()) based on the doctype
    start (int): start year
    end (int): end year

Returns:
    iterator of the protocols as relative paths to current location

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.protocol_iterators
documentation:
Deprecate - Use corpus_iterator() instead.
Returns an iterator of protocol paths in a corpus.

Args:
    corpus_root (str): path to the corpus root. If env variable RECORDS_PATH exists, uses that as a default
    document_type (str): type of document (prot, mot, etc.). If None, fetches all types
    start (int): start year
    end (int): end year

Returns:
    iterator of the protocols as relative paths to current location

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.parse_date
documentation:
Parse datetimes with special error handling

Args:
    s (str): datetime as a string

Returns:
    date (datetime.datetime): date as a datetime

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.get_formatted_uuid
documentation:
Generate a UUID and format it in base58.
The formatted UUID is prepended bu 'i-' so that it can be used as an XML ID

Args:
    seed (str): Random seed. Optional.

Returns:
    id (str): formatted UUID

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.download_corpus
documentation:
Downloads the full corpus.
Does not return anything, just downloads the corpus ZIP and unzips it.

Args:
    path (str): path for the download

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.get_doc_dates
documentation:
Gets the content of <docDate> elements.

Args:
    protocol: str or etree.Element

Returns:

    match_error (bool):  True when the value of the "when" attribte doesn't match the element's text value.
    dates (list): a list of dates.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.write_tei
documentation:
Write a corpus document to disk.

Args:
    elem (etree._Element): tei root element
    dest_path (str): protocol path

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.write_protocol
documentation:
Write the protocol to a file.

Args:
    prot_elem (etree._Element): protocol root element
    prot_path (str): protocol path

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.parse_tei
documentation:
Parse a protocol, return root element (and namespace defnitions).

Args:
    _path (str): path to tei-xml doc
    get_ns (bool): also return namespace dict

Returns:
    tuple/etree._Element: root and an optional namespace dict

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.parse_protocol
documentation:
Parse a protocol, return root element (and namespace defnitions).

Args:
    protocol_path (str): protocol path
    get_ns (bool): also return namespace dict

Returns:
    tuple/etree._Element: root and an optional namespace dict

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.get_data_location
documentation:
Get data location for a specific path. Tries the env variables
RECORDS_PATH, MOTIONS_PATH and METADATA_PATH. If those do not exist
returns the defaults data/, data/, data/

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.get_gh_link
documentation:
return a formatted github link to an lxml element or specified line in _file

Args:
- _file: the path (from root) of the file in question
- elem: the element
- username: the username of the repo owner
- reponame: the repository containing the _file
- branch: the branch you want to link to

Returns:
    gh (str): formatted github link

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.remove_whitespace_from_sequence
documentation:
Remove repeated whitespace and replace all whitespace with spaces
Input is string and output is string.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.get_sequence_from_elem_list
documentation:
Get sequence from first elem in list.
Returns string. If list is empty, returns empty string.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.extract_context_sequence
documentation: Get sequence with context from xml element. Returns string.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.get_context_sequences_for_protocol
documentation: Gets context sequences for a protocol. Returns dictionary with ids and corresponding context sequences.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.utils.pathize_protocol_id
documentation: Turn the protocol id into a path string from riksdagen-records root. Handles 'unpadded' protocol numbers.

modules.name: pyriksdagen.date_handling
documentation: Handle issues relating to dates in the corpus and MP/Minister database.
!/usr/bin/env python3

functions.name: pyriksdagen.date_handling._get_parliament_years
documentation: get a list of parliament years in 4 or 6 digit format

functions.name: pyriksdagen.date_handling.yearize_date
documentation: takes a date and a dataframe of riksdagen-persons/data/riksdag-year.csv

functions.name: pyriksdagen.date_handling.yearize_mandates
documentation:
return a dataframe of mandate periods, lengthened for each parliament year

from
    mp   start        end
    A    2000-10-01   2002-09-30
to
    mp   start       end           parliament_year
    A    2000-10-01  2001-09-30    200001
    A    2001-10-01  2002-09-30    200201

modules.name: pyriksdagen
documentation: A python package for accessing and processing the Swedish parliament data

modules.name: pyriksdagen.export
documentation: Parla Clarin generation

functions.name: pyriksdagen.export.dict_to_tei
documentation:
Convert a metadata dict into a TEI XML tree

Args:
    data (dict): dictionary containing protocol level metadata

Returns:
    tei (lxml.etree.Element): the protocol as a TEI-formatted lxml tree root

functions.name: pyriksdagen.export.add_to_corpus_meta_file_list
documentation: add entry to corpus-level metadata xml files

functions.name: pyriksdagen.export.dict_to_parlaclarin
documentation:
Create per-protocol parlaclarin files of all files provided in file_db.
Does not return anything, instead writes the data on disk.

Args:
    data (dict): metadata and data

Returns:
    None

modules.name: pyriksdagen.metadata
documentation: Class declaration and functions related to corpus metadata
!/usr/bin/env python
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

functions.name: pyriksdagen.metadata.load_Corpus_metadata
documentation: Populates Corpus object

functions.name: pyriksdagen.metadata.fetch_person_name
documentation:
Get a person's primary name or list of names.

Args:
    person_id (str): a swerik-style person ID
    corpus (df): compiled metadata DB
    primary (bool): return only person's primary name

Returns:
    name or names (str or list of str)

functions.name: pyriksdagen.metadata.fetch_person_gender
documentation:
Get Person's gender.

Args:
    person_id (str): a swerik-style person ID
    corpus (df): compiled metadata DB

Returns:
    gender (str): man or woman

functions.name: pyriksdagen.metadata.fetch_person_party
documentation:
Get a person's party affiliation (during a particular period.

Args:
    person_id (str): a swerik-style person ID
    corpus (df): compiled metadata DB
    date (str): (yyyy-mm-dd) formatted date string.
        If the date arg is not None, the fn will try to match
        party affiliations that overlap with that date. If none
        are found, it defaults to all party affiliations

Returns:
    party/ies: str or list of str

classes.name: pyriksdagen.metadata.Corpus
documentation:
Store corpus metadata as a single pandas DataFrame where
the column 'source' indicates the type of the row

modules.name: pyriksdagen.segmentation
documentation:
Implements the segmentation of the data into speeches and
ultimately into the Parla-Clarin XML format.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.segmentation.classify_paragraph
documentation:
Classify paragraph into speeches / descriptions with provided classifier

Args:
    paragraph (str): the text content of a paragraph
    classifier (dict): a dictionary that includes 'dim', 'ft' and 'model' keys for classification
    prior (np.array): log prior for the classes
Classify paragraph

functions.name: pyriksdagen.segmentation.detect_speaker
documentation:
Detect the speaker of the house

Args:
    matched_txt (str): intro text
    speaker_db (pd.df): dataframe containing the speaker metadata
    metadata (dict): metadata about the protocol. Deprecated.

Returns
    speaker_id (str): ID as a string if detected, otherwise None

functions.name: pyriksdagen.segmentation.detect_minister
documentation:
Detect a minister

Args:
    matched_txt (str): intro text
    minister_db (pd.df): dataframe containing the minister metadata
    intro_dict (dict): processed information about the intro text, possibly containing eg. 'gender' 

Returns:
    ministed_id (str): ID as a string if detected, otherwise None

functions.name: pyriksdagen.segmentation.detect_mp
documentation:
Match an MP in a text snippet. Returns an MP id (str) if found, otherwise None.

If multiple people are matched, defaults to returning None.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.segmentation.intro_to_dict
documentation:
Convert introduction to a metadata dictionary.
Tries to detect 'name', 'gender', 'party', 'specified', as well as some misc things labeled as 'other'.

Args:
    intro_text (str): introduction text
    expressions (list): a list of regular expressions used for metadata detection.
        Used for optimization, the algorithm works the same if not provided.

Returns:
    d (dict): detected metadata

functions.name: pyriksdagen.segmentation.detect_introduction
documentation:
Detect whether the current paragraph contains an introduction of a speaker.

Returns a dict if an intro is detected, otherwise None.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.segmentation.combine_intros
documentation: Join intros that have been split as an artifact of the data processing.

modules.name: pyriksdagen.mp
documentation: Handles the data on the members of parliament.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.mp.create_database
documentation: Create an initial version of the MP dataframe

functions.name: pyriksdagen.mp.add_gender
documentation: Based to first names, add gender to an MP dataframe.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.mp.clean_names
documentation: Remove artefacts from MP names and specifiers

functions.name: pyriksdagen.mp.replace_party_abbreviations
documentation: Replace party abbreviations with standardized party names.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.mp.add_id
documentation:
Generate deterministic IDs for mps based on the "name", "party", "district",
"chamber", "start", and "end" columns of the dataframe.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.mp.add_municipality
documentation: Add home municipalities as specifiers for matched MPs from personregister

functions.name: pyriksdagen.refine.redetect_protocol
documentation:
For each intro in a protocol, detect which MP is mentioned and map it to metadata.

Args:
    metadata (dict): basic metadata on the protocol
    protocol (lxml.etree): protocol as an lxml tree

Returns:
    protocol as an lxml tree

functions.name: pyriksdagen.refine.detect_mps
documentation:
For each intro in a protocol, detect which MP is mentioned and map it to metadata.

Args:
    root (lxml.etree): protocol as an lxml tree
    mp_db (pd.df): MP database
    minister (pd.df): minister database 
    speaker_db (pd.df): speaker database 
    metadata (dict): basic metadata on the protocol
    party_map (dict): map from party abbreviations to party names
    join_intros (???): intros to be joined
    protocol_id (str): ID of the protocol
    unknown_variables (list): which variables to detect for unknown MPs

Returns:
    protocol as an lxml tree

functions.name: pyriksdagen.refine.find_introductions
documentation:
Find instances of curation patterns in all files in a folder.

Args:
    root (lxml.etree): protocol as a lxml tree
    pattern_db: Patterns to be matched as a Pandas DataFrame.
    intro_ids: List of IDs that have been detected as intros.
    minister_db: deprecated

functions.name: pyriksdagen.refine.detect_date
documentation:
Detects notes with dates in them. Updates the docDate metadata in the teiHeader accordingly.

Args:
    root (lxml.etree): protocol as a lxml tree
    metadata (dict): basic metadata about the protocol

Returns:
    root (lxml.etree): protocol as a lxml tree
    dates (list): list of the detected dates in an ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD)

functions.name: pyriksdagen.refine.update_ids
documentation:
Update element IDs. TODO

Args:
    root (lxml.etree): protocol as a lxml tree
    protocol_id (str): protocol ID. DEPRECATED

Returns:
    root (lxml.etree): protocol as a lxml tree
    ids (set): set of all IDs in the protocol

functions.name: pyriksdagen.db.year_iterator
documentation: Iterate over triplets of (corpus_year, package_ids, year_db) for provided file database.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.db.load_patterns
documentation: Load regex patterns from disk

functions.name: pyriksdagen.db.filter_db
documentation: Filter dataframe either based on year or protocol id

functions.name: pyriksdagen.db.load_ministers
documentation: Unpacks very nested minister.json file to a df.

classes.name: pyriksdagen.dataset.IntroDataset
documentation: Dataset for predicting introductions

classes.name: pyriksdagen.dataset.MergeDataset
documentation: Dataset for predicting if introduction should be merged with next coming textblock

functions.name: pyriksdagen.download.oppna_data_to_dict
documentation:
Load protocols with the new XML / HTML structure (from 2013 onwards)
and convert it to a python dict with contents.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.download._alto_extract_paragraphs
documentation: Extract text from ALTO XML on paragraph / textBlock level

functions.name: pyriksdagen.download.convert_alto
documentation:
Convert a document from ALTO to a list of paragraphs.

Args:
    filenames: the names of the ALTO files of one document, as a list of str.
        The script assumes zero-padded numbering right before the .xml extension.
    files: ALTO XML files as a list of str in corresponding order to the filenames

functions.name: pyriksdagen.download.dl_kb_blocks
documentation: Download protocol from betalab, convert it to the simple XML 'blocks' schema

functions.name: pyriksdagen.download.count_pages
documentation: Generate a dataframe of pages between provided start and end years. Fetches information from KB's API.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.download.fetch_files
documentation:
Fetch all files with the provided extension from a KBLab package

Args:
    package: KBLab client package
    extension: File extension of the files that you want to fetch.
    String, or None which outputs all filetypes.

functions.name: pyriksdagen.download.randomize_ordinals
documentation: Create pseudo-random ordinal numbers for a database

classes.name: pyriksdagen.download.LazyArchive
documentation:
Wrapper to KBLab archive class so that you don't need to
log in if you don't actually use the archive

functions.name: pyriksdagen.wikidata.reduce_date_precision
documentation: Truncates date to accurate length given precision level

functions.name: pyriksdagen.wikidata.fix_dates
documentation: Converts date precision for all relevant cols and removes the precision columns
